note: Ring presets (owner spec): one entry = one dial styling. positions are dial hours (24 = the bottom Omega slot in DOMY); letters pair with positions by index and come from the letter library (RING_LETTER_FILES). The positions signature picks the LAYOUT: flame (12,20,24,4 - the gold triangle points up), chalice (12,16,24,8 - points down), seal (all six). Adding an entry here (or a custom one in Settings) is all a new styling needs.
